data.content: 1. Acceptance failure: [agent-adapter.ts:209] maps Codex command_execution item.started to stream_event text ([executing] ...), while [history-response-visibility.ts:1] only shows assistant responses when Detail is off. That hides the action entirely in Conversation History instead of preserving agent words and actions. 2. Acceptance failure: [terminal-detail-filter.ts:21] and [terminal-detail-filter.ts:74] only enter detail-suppression mode after a ▶ header or numbered line, and [terminal-detail-filter.ts:96] passes other lines through unchanged. Because Codex emits [executing] ... plus user/tool_result output, terminal Detail-off still leaks command/file output. 3. Coverage gap: [agent-adapter.test.ts:155] asserts the broken stream_event normalization, and [terminal-detail-filter.test.ts:140] only covers ▶-prefixed tool output. There is no regression test for the Codex path that must preserve the action while hiding the result.
